name: @zcaceres/skill-stacked-pr
description: Bundled stacked-PR workflow as one skill. Subcommands ship the next slice (checkpoint), update the current branch's PR (update), push the whole stack (submit), visualize it (log), rebase onto trunk (sync), merge bottom-up (merge). Also bundles the PostToolUse pr-size-nudge hook. Uses git stack when installed, falls back to gh + git.

scripts.build:all: bun run build:linux && bun run build:macos && bun run build:windows
